_comment: One-shot example appended to system prompt when llm.few_shot=true. Edit to match your resume/domain.
input_snippet: We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer with 3+ years experience in Go, Kubernetes, and PostgreSQL. Remote-friendly. Apply at careers@acme.dev or https://acme.dev/apply. Acme Corp, San Francisco.

message_content.subject: Application for Senior Backend Engineer at Acme
message_content.body:
Hi Team,

I'm a backend engineer with 3+ years building Go microservices on Kubernetes. My strongest overlap with your requirements is in Go concurrency patterns and Postgres query optimization.

At my current role I migrated a monolith to 12 Go services on K8s, cutting deploy times by 60% and reducing p95 latency from 320ms to 45ms.

I'd like to bring that same infrastructure-first mindset to Acme's backend team.
